prompts.prompt: Generate a benefit eligibility screening page for emergency housing assistance using Ashlar form capsules and a federal trust shell.
Generate an appointment scheduling page for an in-person benefits interview using Ashlar date, select, and form-field capsules.
Generate a case status tracking page where an applicant can enter a claim number and review next steps.
Generate an account profile update form for a public benefits portal with contact preferences and consent.
Generate an error remediation page after an applicant submits invalid contact information, including an error summary and corrected field.
